turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 86-1387, Mackey against Lanier Collection Agency will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: We have filed an opinion in this case affirming the judgment of the Supreme Court of Georgia. Justice Kennedy has filed a dissenting opinion and Justices Blackmun, O'Connor and Scalia have joined that opinion.
